'''竏嗚-dh-m-h''' ('''kajadhmehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weet|weet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-dh-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weet|weet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗚-dh-m-h
|-
! Lemma
| kajadhmehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijadhmehoko|thijadhmehoko]] || [[word:jijadhmehoko|jijadhmehoko]] || [[word:shijadhmehoko|shijadhmehoko]] || [[word:kijadhmehoko|kijadhmehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujadhmehoko|thuthujadhmehoko]] || [[word:jujujadhmehoko|jujujadhmehoko]] || [[word:shushujadhmehoko|shushujadhmehoko]] || [[word:kukujadhmehoko|kukujadhmehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojadhmehoko|thojadhmehoko]] || [[word:jojadhmehoko|jojadhmehoko]] || [[word:shojadhmehoko|shojadhmehoko]] || [[word:kojadhmehoko|kojadhmehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦjadhmehoko|thﾃｦjadhmehoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦjadhmehoko|jﾃｦjadhmehoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦjadhmehoko|shﾃｦjadhmehoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦjadhmehoko|kﾃｦjadhmehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajadhmehoko|thathajadhmehoko]] || [[word:jajajadhmehoko|jajajadhmehoko]] || [[word:shashajadhmehoko|shashajadhmehoko]] || [[word:kakajadhmehoko|kakajadhmehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajadhmehoko|thajadhmehoko]] || [[word:jajadhmehoko|jajadhmehoko]] || [[word:shajadhmehoko|shajadhmehoko]] || [[word:kajadhmehoko|kajadhmehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajadhmehoko|thajadhmehoko]] || [[word:jajadhmehoko|jajadhmehoko]] || [[word:shajadhmehoko|shajadhmehoko]] || [[word:kajadhmehoko|kajadhmehoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
